snippet.title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: Cape Fear — Official Teaser | Apple TV
snippet.description:
This summer, fear takes hold. Cape Fear premieres June 5 on Apple TV https://apple.co/_CapeFear

A thrilling new series from executive producers Martin Scorsese and Steven Spielberg starring Javier Bardem, Amy Adams, and Patrick Wilson. 

Created for television by Nick Antosca.

Inspired by the 1991 remake directed by Martin Scorsese and produced by Steven Spielberg, a storm is coming for happily married attorneys Anna (Amy Adams) and Tom Bowden (Patrick Wilson) when Max Cady (Javier Bardem), the notorious killer they are responsible for putting behind bars, is let out of prison — and he wants vengeance.

Hailing from UCP, a division of Universal Studio Group, and Amblin Television, “Cape Fear” is based on both the novel “The Executioners,” which inspired Gregory Peck’s Universal Pictures feature (1962) of the same name, as well as the acclaimed 1991 remake directed by Scorsese. The series is executive produced by Steven Spielberg, who produced the 1991 film, alongside Scorsese. Creator Nick Antosca showruns and produces alongside Alex Hedlund for Eat The Cat, and Darryl Frank and Justin Falvey produce alongside Spielberg for Amblin Television. Academy Award nominee Morten Tyldum will direct the pilot and serve as executive producer. The series is developed and produced through Antosca’s overall deal at UCP, where he’s been based since 2017.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. Happy happy happy

Together

It's too bad all I'm good at is lying

Why can I recall the way
I tried to end today?
Considering my body isn't mine
I know it isn't ordinary
Being here just doesn't scare me

No more than the thoughts in my head
No more than the things unsaid

Fall away from me
And leave it all to nothing more than memory

[KAUFMO]
Where is she, what have you done now?

[JAX]
It's my fault? How could you say that

When I leave today

This some way to teach me a lesson?
Rather not have any emotion
Endless pain, but never abstracting
I'm so happy I could just... Hah!

Happy happy happy, I might just stay
Even though I'm trapped, and I'm not okay!
I feel happy happy happy, once in my life
Pretend I'm alright, when I lost my mind

[GANGLE]
Better yet, now here's my chance 
Start again, new life, new dance

[RAGATHA & GANGLE]
Gotta live with no regrets
Let it go begin again

[KINGER]
And just be 

[JAX]
Happy happy happy
Forever more
Just keep holding on here

[RAGATHA, GANGLE, POMNI, KINGER, ZOOBLE]
Together

Oh I'm sorry
Did I lead you on?
We were never even friends
I'm not even my own friend!
(Hahaha...)

Hey let's play dissociate
A round for the applause
I'm stuck inside this stupid game that I played just because
The trauma won't let me forget but masking surely does 
So let me smile and don't make me remember who I was

Hate myself, and hate you too, 'cuz that's what I'm supposed to do!
Broke the game, it's nothing new! What now? There's guns? I've tried that too!

What's left for you ain't left for me
You got the whole damn world to see
If I could ask for one small thing
I better have it be: kill me!

(Kill me, kill me, kill me)
La-da da-da da-da~!
(Kill me, kill me)
I'll ask nicely, just please, kill me
(Kill me, kill me, kill me)
Da-da-da-da~!
(Kill me, kill me)
I'll ask nicely, just please, kill me

I guess that you don't got a clue what kinda things they make of us
That shit's not family friendly, but they weirdly hate it when we cuss
And that's just it, it's all a shtick, an endless loop of dumb nonsense
Not quite the end I tried to win, but hey, that's life, and fuck, it sucks!

Daisy, Daisy
Give me your answer do
You're my plaything
I'm helpless but I don't need you

Hate myself, and hate you too, 'cuz that's what I'm supposed to do!
Hate this game, and hacked it too! I've TRIED a gun, I've THOUGHT THIS THROUGH

What's left for you ain't left for me
You got the whole damn world to see
If I could ask for one small thing
I better have it be: kill me!

snippet.title: Canadian Dream | Chani Nattan | Inderpal Moga | Miss Pooja | Dr. Zeus | Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Experience the latest Punjabi anthem, Canadian Dream, by the powerhouse duo Chani Nattan and Inderpal Moga. This isn't just a song; it’s a tribute to the hustle, the grit, and the self-made journey of every dreamer building their life from the ground up.
Through powerful lyrics and a heavy beat, the song captures the essence of hard work and the pride of turning struggle into success. Whether you're cruising through the city or hitting the gym, "Canadian Dream" is the motivation you need.

After rocketing to global fame, singer-songwriter Noah Kahan faces the pressure of what comes next. Buoyed by his uncanny wit, he returns to his Vermont roots and family to get back in tune with himself in this candid documentary. Watch Noah Kahan: Out of Body – only on Netflix April 13.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82161512

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqbldjZlI3Y2JVMm1FOURuaV9HRnI5bloxYWk2Z3xBQ3Jtc0tsNGctQ19SMGdrMURUUEE5VjBOdzV1QzYyYlIxeVRnR19RLTlfUGtWbF9GQmtFQVNCR2Vsam5pQWpuVDFiTTdzTWRzQkE3aktWUzd5TjBaOHpuUGtqVURwZXI3TFhtd0d2SWhlbVMtLXFTNTUyS3VHUQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fshare.epidemicsound.com%2F1xis5q%2F%3Fplaylist%3Duad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y&v=3V7Rvo4Gvic

🎵 Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

snippet.title: SUPERGIRL OFFICIAL TRAILER REACTION!! Trailer 2 | Jason Momoa Lobo | Superman | DC Studios
snippet.description:
SUPERMAN CAMEO ALREADY?! Greg Alba, Coy Jandreau, and Roxy Striar react to the brand-new Supergirl trailer from DC Studios and James Gunn’s DCU! This new look gives us a much better sense of the movie’s tone, scale, and emotional core, including our best trailer look yet at Milly Alcock’s Kara Zor-El / Supergirl, Jason Momoa’s Lobo, the destruction and trauma tied to Argo, the intergalactic revenge quest with Ruthye, and the major role Krypto plays in kicking off the story. Director Craig Gillespie has described the film as a sci-fi epic inspired in part by True Grit and John Wick, with Kara helping Ruthye track down Krem after Ruthye’s family is murdered and Krypto is poisoned.
In this trailer reaction, we talk about the melancholy vibe, the heavier emotional weight compared to Superman, the cosmic scope, the action, the visual style, and how much more tragic and battle-worn this version of Supergirl feels. We also get into Lobo’s presence, how important Ruthye looks to the story, the destruction of Argo City / Kryptonian life, and what the movie seems to be setting up for Kara emotionally as she moves through this revenge-driven DCU adventure. Craig Gillespie said the film digs deep into Krypton’s culture and Argo specifically to shape Kara’s personality and pain, which is all over this footage.
We also discuss the Superman connection / cameo angle, since David Corenswet’s Superman is expected to appear alongside Kara in the film after her DCU debut path was tied to Superman, and the trailer continues to make this feel like a true extension of the new shared universe James Gunn and Peter Safran are building. Supergirl stars Milly Alcock, Jason Momoa, Eve Ridley, Matthias Schoenaerts, David Krumholtz, and Emily Beecham, and it hits theaters and IMAX on June 26, 2026.
As for the upcoming DCU movie slate under James Gunn, the current theatrical lineup includes Supergirl (June 26, 2026), Clayface (September 2026), and Man of Tomorrow (July 2027), while other DCU film projects in development include The Brave and the Bold, Swamp Thing, The Authority, Teen Titans, and Wonder Woman

snippet.title: Tame Impala, JENNIE - Dracula (JENNIE Remix)
snippet.description:
Tame Impala, JENNIE - Dracula (JENNIE Remix)
Get:

Lyrics:

[Intro: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
Oh (You and me)
Oh (Hahaha)
(Check it out now)
(Hahaha, mm)
(Dracula)
(Ba-da-bing, ba-da-boom)
(Dracula)

[Verse 1: Tame Impala, JENNIE, Tame Impala & JENNIE]
The morning light is turning blue, the feeling is bizarre (Bizarre)
The night is almost over, I still don't know where you are
The shadows, yeah, they keep me pretty like a movie star
Daylight makes me feel like Dracula (Dracula)

[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (You and me)
In the darkness, I would never leave (Never leave)
You won't ever see me in the light of day
It's far too late, the time has come

[Verse 2: Tame Impala, JENNIE, Tame Impala & JENNIE]
I'm on the verge of caving in, I run back to the dark (Dark)
Now I'm Mr. Charisma, fuckin' Pablo Escobar
My friends are saying, "Shut up, Jennie, just get in the car" (Hahaha; Jennie)
I just wanna be right where you are (Oh, my love)

[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE, JENNIE, Tame Impala]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (You and me)
In the darkness, I would never leave (Never leave; I won't leave her)
We both saw this moment comin' from afar (Comin' from afar)
Now here we are (Here we are)

[Chorus: JENNIE & Tame Impala]
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sun)
Isn't the view spectacular? (Dracula; Dracula)

[Verse 3: JENNIE & Tame Impala]
Hey, Kevin, what's up? (Haha)
Come pull up in my spot
Let's keep the night glowing
I don't ever wanna stop (Hahaha)
I'll never leave this floor, got me needin' more (Oh)
Sky is turning blue, let it clear the smoke
Lip-stain on the rim, bass is 'bout to blow (Oh)
Sinking in my teeth, I buy time

[Bridge: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
But please, do you think about what it might mean? (Mean)
'Cause I dream about you in my sleep
Would you ever love someone like me (Someone like me)
Like me? (Oh)

[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE, JENNIE]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (Oh, my love)
In the darkness, I would never leave
We both saw this moment comin' from afar (Comin' from afar)
Now here we are (Here we are)

[Chorus: Tame Impala & JENNIE, Tame Impala, JENNIE]
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Isn't the view spectacular?
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Isn't the view spectacular? (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Isn't the view spectacular?
